oneOf.description: Command shorthand — creates a single-pane session running this command.

command.description: Command to run in the first pane (string shorthand form).

windows.description: Window definitions for the default session template.

DefaultSession.description: Template for projects without a config file. A plain string sets the command for a single-pane session.

default_shell.description: Shell to set as tmux default-command for new sessions.

pane_init.description: Commands run in every pane before pane-specific commands.

default_session.description: Template used for projects without a config file. Accepts a layout string or full session definition.

project_dirs.description: Directories for project discovery. A single string or a list of paths. Supports ~ expansion.

picker.description: Fuzzy finder backend for interactive session selection.

picker_on_bare.description: Open picker when nux is run with no arguments outside a project directory.

zoxide.description: Use zoxide for directory discovery as a resolver fallback.

groups.description: Named groups of projects for batch operations (e.g. nux @work).

root.description: Working directory override for this pane.

command.description: Command to run in this pane.

Pane.description: Pane definition. A plain string is shorthand for {command: <string>}.

StringOrList.description: Directories for project discovery. A single string or a list of paths. Supports ~ expansion.

name.description: Window name shown in the tmux status bar.

root.description: Working directory override. Relative paths resolve against project root.

layout.description: Tmux pane layout. Also accepts custom tmux layout strings.

env.description: Environment variables set in all panes of this window. Merged with project-level env; window values take precedence.

panes.description: Pane definitions. Every window must have at least one pane.
